title: Map relationship of business organisation to culture and Country
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Map relationship of business organisation to culture and Country demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Establish reasons for entering or establishing business

pcs.text: Describe and communicate the reasons and goals for entering or establishing business
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Describe and communicate the reasons and goals for entering or establishing business?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Describe and communicate the reasons and goals for entering or establishing business.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Map the relationship between culture and the reasons for entering or establishing business.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain the business activity as it relates to Country to management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain the business activity as it relates to Country to management.
